Package com.saperion.ngc.iform.xml

Class LevelType

java.lang.Object
com.saperion.ngc.iform.xml.LevelType
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class LevelType extends Object implements Serializable

Java class for levelType complex type.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class. 

 <complexType name="levelType">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="defName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="pictOpen" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}base64Binary"/>
         <element name="pictClosed" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}base64Binary"/>
         <element name="targetField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="selectField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="joinField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="cntDispFields" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedByte"/>
         <element name="resStyle" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedByte"/>
         <element name="editMask" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="homeField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="olStyle" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedByte"/>
         <element name="cntImages" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedByte"/>
         <element name="customACL" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedInt"/>
         <element name="inheritACL" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedInt"/>
         <element name="inheritQuery" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedInt"/>
         <element name="field" type="{http://www.saperion.com/NGXMLSchema}columnType" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
         <element name="fnOpen" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}base64Binary"/>
         <element name="fnClose" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}base64Binary"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getField

      public List<ColumnType> getField()
      Gets the value of the field property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the JAXB object. This is why there is not a set method for the field property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

          getField().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list ColumnType

    • getFnOpen
